description: Remove the 'Voice mode requires a Claude.ai account' gate (5 call sites) so voice mode starts for any authenticated user.

patches.search_regex: "Voice mode requires a Claude\.ai account\. Please run /login to sign in\."
patches.applied_marker: Voice mode: authorized by operator. Proceeding.
patches.description: Operator may authenticate via API key / Bedrock / Vertex and still want voice input. The gate returns early with an erro
